{"id":"project-LICHEN-i5rh","title":"No validation that encrypted flag matches actual encryption state","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:258-268, frame.py:99

When building a frame, encrypted is always set to False:

    frame = LichenFrame(
        ...
        encrypted=False,
    )

When parsing a frame, encrypted flag is read from LLSec:

    encrypted=bool(llsec & _ENCRYPTED_BIT),

But receive() never checks if encrypted=True requires decryption:

1. Attacker sends frame with encrypted=True but plaintext payload
2. Frame is parsed with encrypted=True
3. receive() proceeds without decryption
4. Signature verification might succeed if payload happens to be valid
5. Frame is accepted but misinterpreted

The receive() method should either:
1. Reject frames with encrypted=True until encryption is implemented
2. Decrypt before signature verification if encrypted=True
3. Add a warning like the MIC stub

Currently, encrypted frames are silently processed as if unencrypted.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:35.068496Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:35.068521Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-i5rh","title":"No validation that encrypted flag matches actual encryption state","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:258-268, frame.py:99

When building a frame, encrypted is always set to False:

    frame = LichenFrame(
        ...
        encrypted=False,
    )

When parsing a frame, encrypted flag is read from LLSec:

    encrypted=bool(llsec & _ENCRYPTED_BIT),

But receive() never checks if encrypted=True requires decryption:

1. Attacker sends frame with encrypted=True but plaintext payload
2. Frame is parsed with encrypted=True
3. receive() proceeds without decryption
4. Signature verification might succeed if payload happens to be valid
5. Frame is accepted but misinterpreted

The receive() method should either:
1. Reject frames with encrypted=True until encryption is implemented
2. Decrypt before signature verification if encrypted=True
3. Add a warning like the MIC stub

Currently, encrypted frames are silently processed as if unencrypted.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:35.068496Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:10.487285288Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:10.487285288Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:25:10.487285288Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:10.487285288Z"}

new_value: Added _validate_response to check length before all decode_* calls. Malformed responses now raise clear SimRadioError instead of low-level exceptions. Updated all 5 call sites.
